name: adazella-dev-kit
description: Adazella Agent Development Kit. Full 5-layer Claude Code setup: orchestrator + 12 specialized agents + 6 skills + 5 hooks + 7 slash commands. Install once → every teammate gets the same superpowers.
author: Sustainaura LLC

agents._comment_team: Agent Team — orchestrator dispatches these in parallel for multi-layer features
agents._comment_quality: Quality + Safety — invoked individually for QA, security, validation
agents._comment_specialist: Domain specialists — invoked for specific deep-domain work

_workflow.1_simple_bug_fix: Talk to main session directly. No agents needed.
_workflow.2_focused_specialist_task: Invoke ONE specialist (e.g. ml-agent for AI features). Same context window.
_workflow.3_complex_multi_layer_feature: Invoke orchestrator → it dispatches setup-agent + api-agent + frontend-agent + scheduler-agent IN PARALLEL → each has own context → 4× faster main session

_install_instructions: 2. .claude/ directory comes with the repo (already in git)
3. Create their own CLAUDE.local.md (gitignored, free-form scratchpad)
4. Their Claude Code instance picks up settings.json automatically
5. They get: same skills + agents + hooks + slash commands as you
6. Run /standup their first morning to verify everything wires up
